title: Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew — Chapter 849
main_description: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 171 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
key_events: Sanji Is Trapped by the Wedding
Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
